extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won the Champs-Elysées sprint after Cavendish was boxed in final kilometer, completing hat-trick of stage wins across different terrain types
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-QuickStep controlled Champs-Elysées despite Cavendish leading green jersey, revealing protective rather than aggressive sprint positioning tactics.
Van Aert's Tour triple (mountain/TT/Champs sprint) signals jumbo-visma's willingness to prioritize stage wins even with diminished GC roster.
Cavendish boxed in final kilometer despite green jersey advantage suggests positioning errors when QuickStep controls rather than leads sprint train.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Completed unprecedented hat-trick winning mountain stage, time trial, and Champs-Elysées sprint in single Tour edition
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Boxed in final kilometer on Champs-Elysées despite leading green jersey classification, revealing positioning vulnerability when not prioritized
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: neutral: Final Tour stage before retirement announcement shows immediate career-end timing after completing Grand Tour
